sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">PMag.Par.</title_>1, 2 = C. Wessely, <title_ TEIform="title">Wiener Denkschr.</title_> xxxvi (2) (1888) pp. 44-126, pp. 139-148; partly in A. Dieterich, <title_ TEIform="title">Eine Mithras- liturgie,</title_> Leipzig 1903, pp. 1 ff., and A. Deissmann, <title_ TEIform="title">Light from the Ancient East,</title_> London 1919, pp. 258 ff. ( = <title_ TEIform="title">PMag.</title_>4, 3).</item>
